text:
BOTTOM LINE — Broadening tape, mega-cap tech crushed. Defensive sectors surged on rotation out of tech growth, while small caps outperformed large caps by 1.22pp, confirming a high-to-low beta shift as semis collapsed 4.46%.

INDICES — VIX 16.7, above its 20-day MA of 16.9. RSP +0.98%, DIA -0.21%, IWM -0.06%, SPY -0.54%, QQQ -1.64%. Small > large by 1.22pp. Gold fell 1.98%, outperforming silver at -3.49%. QQQ is below its 200-day MA, triggering a CTA sell signal.

VOLUME — SPY volume ratio 1.0x, QQQ 0.9x. SOXX saw elevated volume at 1.1x with price down 4.46%, signaling distribution in semiconductors. XLP and XLV showed volume and price up, indicating accumulation in defensives.

SECTORS & ROTATION — XLP Staples +2.80%, XLV Healthcare +2.22%, XLRE Real Estate +2.02%, XLE Energy +0.92%, XLB Materials +0.77%, XLU Utilities +0.55%, XLF Financials +0.34%, XLY Discretionary +0.29%, XLI Industrials +0.05%, XLC Comms -0.64%, XLK Technology -2.24%. Top Industries: IHI +4.69%, KRE +2.82%. Bottom: WGMI -9.25%, DRAM -8.82%. Money flowing out of XLK and XLC into XLP, XLV, and XLRE — broad risk-off rotation.

POSITIONING — SPY put-call ratio 1.18, elevated protection demand. QQQ skew at +11.9%, extreme put premium indicating fear. QQQ spot near its gamma flip at 610, amplifying downside moves. VIX above its 20-day MA, confirming elevated fear.

CROSS-ASSET — Gold down 1.98% alongside equities, a rare negative correlation break as dollar strength (+0.32%) pressured metals, while silver plunged 3.49%.

SIGNALS & WATCH — Fear & Greed 67.5/100 Greed. Top movers: ABT +10.71% (Medtech), JBHT +8.01% (Freight), DRAM -8.82% (Semis). Best sector momentum: XLE +2.65% 20d; worst: XLK -7.44%. Vol spike ticker ABT shows accumulation (vol 2.4x, price up). Watch: WGMI -9.25%, vol spike distribution on crypto-mining rout; QQQ near gamma flip at 610, trend divergence from SPY; GLD -1.98%, cross-asset signal as dollar strength breaks gold’s risk-off bid.
